en.title: About me
en.description: I move across backend, frontend and design when needed, but the center stays the same: understanding the full system to make better decisions.
en.extra: My profile blends technical thinking, visual sensitivity and product awareness.

es.extra: Mi perfil mezcla pensamiento técnico, sensibilidad visual y visión de producto.
